note: The mathematical content is correct. The algebraic deduction is elementary and valid: from dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) - 1 = dim(F_{S(A)}(phi)) (Step 1/Node 1.3.2) and dim(F_{S(A)}(phi)) <= m (Step 2/Node 1.3.3), we chain the equality with the inequality to get dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) - 1 <= m, hence dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) <= m + 1. The subtraction of 1 is well-defined because the inequality forces finiteness. Two non-blocking issues raised: (1) missing formal dependency declarations on 1.3.2 and 1.3.3 (minor), (2) inference type mislabeled as assumption rather than deduction (note).
